de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model

Interface IExecutionMethodReturn

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IExecutionBaseMethodReturn<SourceElement>, IExecutionElement, IExecutionNode<SourceElement>
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    ExecutionMethodReturn, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessMethodReturn

    public interface IExecutionMethodReturn
extends IExecutionBaseMethodReturn<SourceElement>

    A node in the symbolic execution tree which represents a method return, e.g. return 42.

    The default implementation is ExecutionMethodReturn which is instantiated via a SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder instance.

    Author:
    Martin Hentschel
    See Also:
    SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder, ExecutionMethodReturn

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.IExecutionNode

        INTERNAL_NODE_NAME_END, INTERNAL_NODE_NAME_START

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      String getNameIncludingReturnValue()
      Returns the human readable node name including the return value (getReturnValues()).
      IExecutionMethodReturnValue[] getReturnValues()
      Returns the possible return values.
      String getSignatureIncludingReturnValue()
      Returns the human readable signature including the return value (getReturnValues()).
      boolean isReturnValuesComputed()
      Checks if the values of getReturnValues() are already computed.

      • isReturnValuesComputed

        boolean isReturnValuesComputed()
        Checks if the values of getReturnValues() are already computed.
        Returns:
        true value of getReturnValues() are already computed, false values of getReturnValues() needs to be computed.
